subcodes.title: Words to Kathryn Frankland spoken at house of the Master in Haifa, 1920-11-22
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God you have been here a month and have attained to the privilege of visiting the Holy Tombs
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @The Holy Spirit
